News

Bob Blackman on Pro-Palestine Hate Marches

Thursday, 18 December, 2025
We all mourn the victims of the Bondi Beach terror attack. Hate marches calling for a global intifada have led to this attack on Jewish people The Met have said these chants will now be an arrestable offence. I welcome this, but ask what will happen elsewhere across the country Follow Bob online: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bobblackmanofficial Instagram: https://www.instagram.com...
